voice_observations.caption_text: Tried, tested, @hibaaw approved. Shop her spring picks on levelshoes.com
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Now that winter has officially wrapped up, spring is right around the corner. There are so many things on my spring wishlist, so I want to show you some of them. Let's go! Starting off with the most controversial pair, the Tabis from Maison Margiela. It's either you love them or you hate them. I think the black leather is so chic and I feel like I'm going to be wearing them a lot. Obviously, a spring scarf is essential. I see myself wearing this with a convertible car just driving down the road. I think these are so stunning from Ferragamo. Also, very transitional into summer as well. I'm going to try it on because I'm a big scarf girl. I'm trying to stay away from wearing sneakers this spring, but this specific pair feels like a little bit of an in-between. They're from Therese van Noten. It's a sneaker and a mule. It's also backless, so it's going to obviously be really comfortable. Another pair from the brand that I'm loving as well is this really cool sculptural heel that is purple and blue. Really nice spring colours. And purple is my favourite colour, so I'm wearing this in spring for sure. If you ask me what the perfect bag for spring is, I think I would say this one from Chloé. Obviously, spring means flowers and bloom. I love the chain. It's so unique. And I don't think I've seen anything like it, so I'm going home with it. Best for last, obviously, Alaya. This is a pair that I'm obsessed with. I'm obsessed with the glass wedge. I feel it's a staple that you could wear with everything. And it is absolutely timeless. It comes with another colour, which is more of a silver, but the black just has my name written all over it. Hope you enjoyed my spring picks as much as I enjoyed looking for them. Thanks for watching and see you next time.
notable_phrases: Tried, tested, approved. Shop her spring picks on levelshoes.com
